About Me

Flutter Developer

I build high-performance, pixel-perfect Flutter applications with clean, maintainable architecture at their core. Specialising in Riverpod, and Clean Architecture, I design systems that scale without accumulating technical debt.

My workflow spans the full mobile stack from crafting smooth animations to wiring up Firebase, Supabase, and custom REST APIs. I work with clients globally and am open to remote opportunities worldwide.

  • Clean Architecture
  • Design-system minded

Selected Work

Projects that
shipped.

FeaturedProduction Ready

AI-powered career intelligence

Resume Analyzer

Enterprise-grade resume analysis tool built with Flutter and Firebase. Features intelligent AI scoring, PDF handling, JWT auth, and a 3-step onboarding flow — all on Clean Architecture.

FlutterFirebaseRiverpodGoogle APIsClean ArchitectureGetItdartz
GitHub
Full-StackReal-time

Real-time group expense splitting

FairShare

Collaborative expense tracking app for groups. Real-time sync powered by Supabase, smart multi-strategy splitting algorithms, and custom PostgreSQL functions for balance reconciliation.

FlutterSupabasePostgreSQLRiverpod
GitHub
Full-StackData Viz

Full-stack inventory intelligence

Inventory Dashboard

Comprehensive inventory management system — Flutter + Riverpod frontend connected to a FastAPI + SQL Server backend. Interactive FL Chart visualisations, CSV export, and secure file permissions.

FlutterFastAPIRiverpodFL Chart
GitHub
MobileE-Commerce

Modern mobile shopping experience

E-Commerce App

Feature-rich mobile commerce app with full product catalog, GetX reactive state management, persistent cart via GetStorage, dark mode support, and a polished Material 3 design system.

FlutterGetXGetStorageMaterial 3
